Record your entire bike adventure by combining 2 Garmin devices with the Garmin VIRB XE Bike Combo Mount. This combo-bike support provides an easy installation for a Edge bike computer and a VIRB X or XE on your handlebar. This lowers your total weight by combining to supports into one and keep your cockpit clean. This support with extra long arm ensures you have a comfortable upright sit for a better view and more safety. You mount the Edge to the top and the VIRB to the bottom of the mount. The support is made of sturdy material, for stable footage and a good readability of your Edge bike computer.
Past perfect, zit super vast.
Bra fäste för att montera cykellyse under cykeldator, har GoPro fäste under och Garmin ovan.
Skulle helst varit lite längre.
De Garmin VIRB Combo Fietssteun is een uitstekend product. Makkelijk te monteren, sterk en degelijk.

The videos above are the multimedia presentation entitled The Journey towards being The Explorer. They are all about the task they needed to do during the KOS Amazing Explorace last Saturday. I have cut the video into 4 parts so it'll be easier for viewers to watch them. Note the low quality viewing. To participants and others who would like to get the copy with a better quality, just consult me. I'll pass it to you for free.
Thanks to Zickree for preparing the video and thanks also to all participants who captured the materials for the video.
Do you enjoy watching the video?
